name: The ETHGlobal Bangkok 2024 finalists are in! We're thrilled to share
snippet: The ETHGlobal Bangkok 2024 finalists are in! We're thrilled to share 10 projects that stuck out to our judges from 713 built:

name: ETHGlobal Bangkok
snippet: ETHGlobal hackathons enable you to experiment with cutting edge web3 technologies and develop an idea you're passionate about.

name: A quick overview of the top ten winning projects at ETHGlobal
snippet:
As DevCon is in full swing, ETH Global Bangkok has selected 10 winning projects from 713 candidate projects. Overall, the winning projects cover popular tracks ...

name: ETHGlobal Bangkok 2024 Recap Video - YouTube
snippet: From November 15-17 2024, ETHGlobal welcomed developers from around the globe to take part in shaping the future of Ethereum at ETHGlobal ...

name: ETHGlobal Bangkok Finalist Pack
snippet:
Each finalist team member receives 500 USDC delivered to their verified wallets. ... As a Finalist from any ETHGlobal hackathon you automatically qualify to mint ...
ETHGlobal Bangkok Finalist Pack. This Pack is available for members of any finalist team at ETHGlobal Bangkok 2024 to mint!

name: ETHGlobal Bangkok Hackathon announces 10 winning projects
snippet:
The ten finalists selected by the judges focused on the rapidly growing areas of the crypto field, including meme coins, AI agents, DAO tools, and more.
ETHGlobal Bangkok Hackathon announces 10 winning projects, including AI agents, Telegram mini-programs, and other tracks. 2024-11-18 08:07:48.
